heading: Reserve commissioned officers who have served as Attending Physician to the Congress: grade on transfer to Retired Reserve
label: 12772 Reserve commissioned officers who have served as Attending Physician to the Congress: grade on transfer to Retired Reserve
text: Unless entitled to a higher grade under another provision of law, a reserve commissioned officer who is transferred to the Retired Reserve after having served in the position of Attending Physician to the Congress is entitled to be placed on the retired list established by in the grade held by the officer while serving in that position.section 12774(a) of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , prior to repeal by .section 1374(e) of this titlePub. L. 103–337, § 1662(k)(2)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .Dec. 1, 1994section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title
